Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Xin Jianyue Digital Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Xinjianyue Digital Technology Co., Ltd. is an extremely typical absurd case where a 'single-person micro general store and universal contractor shell in the Zhujiang Road electronics market' was misjudged by the system as a major electronic device manufacturing plant. The forensic engine has completely erased the underlying fake cross-border hardware OEM data pollution implicated by Apple Inc. The official commercial system mindlessly categorized it into the 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing' sector at the top of the industrial pyramid simply because its name contains 'Digital Technology.' However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately executed a comprehensive peeling: this is a micro-enterprise established in 2010, with a paid-in capital of 5 million, but its 2024 insured headcount is shockingly only '1 person'! The most fatal coup de grace comes from its extremely magical registered coordinates: 'Room Chu 1523, Building 2, No. 88 Zhujiang Road, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' Zhujiang Road is a famous computer and digital street in Nanjing, and 'Room Chu 1523' (Chu means storage) implies that not only is it located on a high floor (15th floor) of a commercial office building, but it is also highly likely a converted 'storage room/utility room'! In a storage room on the 15th floor of a commercial building, relying on the boss alone, to establish a heavy-asset assembly line manufacturing electronic devices? This not only violates physical common sense but is a humorous deconstruction of the industrial system. Reviewing its true business license, which is like a hodgepodge: the first half is a typical market middleman business 'sales of electronic products, hardware and electrical appliances; leasing and maintenance of office equipment'; the second half directly crosses boundaries and becomes a universal contractor 'security engineering, interior and exterior decoration engineering construction; advertising production.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; it is a 'One-Person IT Retailer & Universal Contracting Shell hidden in a 15th-floor storage room on Zhujiang Road.' The boss (Yin Weifan) most likely rented an extremely cheap storage room as a registered address and warehouse, usually making money by reselling computer consumables and helping people repair copiers, while using this shell to take on odd jobs for office decoration and running network cables to install surveillance everywhere.
